# JSON Helper — LLM-readable summary

**URL**: https://jsonhelper-five.vercel.app/
**Source**: https://github.com/Krokmouuu/JsonHelper
**Category**: Developer tool / JSON utility
**License**: Open source
**Cost**: Free
**Login required**: No

## Description

JSON Helper is a free browser-based tool that renders JSON as an interactive visual node graph. Users can paste or type JSON and immediately see a live tree visualization. The tool supports editing values directly in the graph, searching by key or value, undo/redo, zoom/pan navigation, and two tree layout directions (vertical and horizontal).

## Key differentiators

- Everything runs client-side: no data is ever sent to a server
- Works instantly without any account or installation
- Combines a code editor and a visual graph in a split-view interface
- Supports deeply nested JSON structures with smooth navigation
- Open source and free

## Full documentation

https://jsonhelper-five.vercel.app/llms.txt
